name: broken tackles from plays for wide receivers via trg_pid
description: Strict trg_pid attribution check: filtered to WR-only with a minimum games threshold, this view exercises the receiving-only side of the COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid) attribution. Pre-fix (pid_columns: ['bc_pid']), every row would render as zero broken tackles because nfl_plays.bc_pid is NULL on completed receptions -- WR broken tackles are attributed to trg_pid. Post-fix the column must surface non-zero totals for players like Puka Nacua and Zay Flowers.
expected_query: with "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid) as pid, SUM(mbt) as broken_tackles_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2025) group by COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid)), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2025]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" as materialized (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2025) group by COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."broken_tackles_from_plays" AS "broken_tackles_from_plays_0", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."trg_from_plays" AS "trg_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288" on "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" on "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('WR') group by "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."broken_tackles_from_plays", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."trg_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 15
